error.action_required: data.action field is required (search, detail, article).
error.oc_missing: LAW_API_OC is not configured. Register API credential at Settings > System Modules > law-search (open.law.go.kr -> My Page -> Credentials).
error.unknown_action: Unknown action: {{action}}. Use one of search / detail / article.
error.detail_id_required: detail action requires one of ID, MST, LM, or query (law name).
error.article_id_required: article action requires ID, MST, or query (law name).
error.article_jo_required: article action requires JO (article number, 6 digits). Examples: Article 2=000200, Article 10=001000
error.network: law.go.kr connection failed: {{message}} ({{cause}}). Please retry later.
